description_long: This modern two-story house features a flat green roof with a prominent glass atrium, large windows, and a mix of white and beige exterior walls. The front yard includes a driveway with a red car, a tall palm tree, and a gated entrance. The backyard boasts a spacious wooden deck, an outdoor dining area, a hot tub, and a large rectangular swimming pool bordered by a low white fence. The house has a clean, geometric design with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with sliding glass doors opening onto the deck. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending natural elements with sleek architectural lines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat green roof, large windows, a glass atrium, and a backyard featuring a pool, deck, and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a red car, palm tree, and the backyard deck with pool and hot tub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long white wall, large windows, and the full length of the pool and deck area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat green roof, glass atrium, and minimal window arrangement on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the driveway, main gate, palm tree, and a clear view of the house's two-story structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, small steps, a gated driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
